mapper.sql: id, task_id, plan_id, sub_task_id, canonical_symbol, scope_detail, status, row_count, inserted_count, updated_count, skipped_count, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_data_sync_task_item (task_id, plan_id, sub_task_id, canonical_symbol, scope_detail, status, row_count, inserted_count, updated_count, skipped_count, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{planId}, #{subTaskId}, #{canonicalSymbol}, #{scopeDetail}, #{status}, #{rowCount}, #{insertedCount}, #{updatedCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})

INSERT INTO market_data_sync_task_item (task_id, plan_id, sub_task_id, canonical_symbol, scope_detail, status, row_count, inserted_count, updated_count, skipped_count, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at) VALUES
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.planId}, #{item.subTaskId}, #{item.canonicalSymbol}, #{item.scopeDetail}, #{item.status}, #{item.rowCount}, #{item.insertedCount}, #{item.updatedCount}, #{item.skippedCount}, #{item.errorCode}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.startedAt}, #{item.finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_data_sync_task_item WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id ASC
